mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.project_id AS "projectId", d.id AS "detailId", d.version, d.architecture_attachments AS "architectureAttachments", d.structure_attachments AS "structureAttachments", d.decoration_attachments AS "decorationAttachments", d.procurement_attachments AS "procurementAttachments", d.solution_explanation AS "solutionExplanation", d.confirm_members AS "confirmMembers", a.status, a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.updated_by AS "updatedBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt", p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", creator.name AS "createdByName", updater.name AS "updatedByName", CASE a.status WHEN 1 THEN '待提交' WHEN 2 THEN '待确认' WHEN 3 THEN '已归档' ELSE '' END AS "statusText" FROM construction_drawing a LEFT JOIN construction_drawing_detail d ON d.construction_drawing_id = a.id AND d.version = (SELECT MAX(cd.version) FROM construction_drawing_detail cd WHERE cd.construction_drawing_id = a.id) LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account updater ON updater.id = a.updated_by WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT d.id, d.construction_drawing_id AS "constructionDrawingId", d.version, d.architecture_attachments AS "architectureAttachments", d.structure_attachments AS "structureAttachments", d.decoration_attachments AS "decorationAttachments", d.procurement_attachments AS "procurementAttachments", d.solution_explanation AS "solutionExplanation", d.confirm_members AS "confirmMembers", d.created_by AS "createdBy", d.updated_by AS "updatedBy", d.created_at AS "createdAt", d.updated_at AS "updatedAt", creator.name AS "createdByName", updater.name AS "updatedByName" FROM construction_drawing_detail d LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = d.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account updater ON updater.id = d.updated_by WHERE d.construction_drawing_id = #{constructionDrawingId} ORDER BY d.version DESC, d.id DESC

SELECT id, construction_drawing_id AS "constructionDrawingId", version, architecture_attachments AS "architectureAttachments", structure_attachments AS "structureAttachments", decoration_attachments AS "decorationAttachments", procurement_attachments AS "procurementAttachments", solution_explanation AS "solutionExplanation", confirm_members AS "confirmMembers", created_by AS "createdBy", updated_by AS "updatedBy", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM construction_drawing_detail WHERE id = ( SELECT MAX(cdd.id) FROM construction_drawing_detail cdd WHERE cdd.construction_drawing_id = #{constructionDrawingId} AND cdd.version = ( SELECT MAX(cddv.version) FROM construction_drawing_detail cddv WHERE cddv.construction_drawing_id = #{constructionDrawingId} ) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO construction_drawing_detail ( construction_drawing_id, version, architecture_attachments, structure_attachments, decoration_attachments, procurement_attachments, solution_explanation, confirm_members, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{constructionDrawingId}, #{version}, #{architectureAttachments}, #{structureAttachments}, #{decorationAttachments}, #{procurementAttachments}, #{solutionExplanation}, #{confirmMembers}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE construction_drawing_detail SET version = #{version}, architecture_attachments = #{architectureAttachments}, structure_attachments = #{structureAttachments}, decoration_attachments = #{decorationAttachments}, procurement_attachments = #{procurementAttachments}, solution_explanation = #{solutionExplanation}, confirm_members = #{confirmMembers}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
